title: Autoslide (Work Project)
description: Designed and developed a responsive UI/Dashboard in React for Autoslide during my tenure at Webninjaz. Focused on pixel-perfect implementation and interactive components.

title: Stocks-Company Dashboard (Work Project)
description: Created a dynamic stocks dashboard at Webninjaz featuring interactive charts and a modern UI for real-time data visualization.

title: Sailer Notification System (Work Project)
description: Migrated a legacy Angular application to React for sailor notifications. Implemented offline support using Service Workers and Dexie.js (IndexedDB).

title: Leave Management System
description: Full-stack ASP.NET Core MVC application for employee leave management. Features role-based access control, Identity, EF Core, and CI/CD via Azure.

title: Food Webapp
description: Complete full-stack CRUD application with JWT authentication, debounced search, and email-based password reset using Next.js and MongoDB.

title: Document App UI
description: A refined Frontend(UI) for a document storage app, built to demonstrate mastery over React hooks and TailwindCSS layout systems.
